content:
Below is a sample “Module Navigation & Weekly Overview” document that you can adapt for your course. It incorporates a clear weekly checklist, a breakdown of readings with expectations, enhanced peer feedback protocols, and reflection activities—all built on your 6‑week structure.

⸻

Course Module Navigation & Weekly Overview

Welcome to ENG101 – English Composition! This guide is designed to help you navigate each week of the course. Every module follows a consistent flow so you know what to expect, when to complete readings, peer reviews, and reflection activities, and how to build toward your final portfolio submission.

⸻

General Weekly Structure

Each week (except Week 6, which is our Final Portfolio & Exam Week) follows this format:
1. Monday: Warm-Up, Prewriting & Discussion
• Readings & Expectations: Read assigned pages/articles in the “Readings & Expectations” section before the lecture. These readings provide foundational knowledge for that week’s essay type.
